conflict_types.description: two evidence nodes disagree on the same claim
two procedures prescribe contradictory steps for the same situation
two validation predicates yield opposite results on the same state
current state cannot match the precondition of any eligible branch
declared intent contradicts current operational state
recovery indicators disagree (e.g., partial success + failure flag)
two layers claim authority over the same decision

resolution_rules: no conflict may be resolved silently
evidence-conflict at verified-truth tier escalates to OEM (P0 procedures)
predicate-conflict halts the chain and emits validation-finding
authority-conflict resolves by the declared layer ordering (knowledge-core wins; adaptive/decision/reasoning never override)
every conflict event is recorded for knowledge-health intake
unsafe_indicators: chain crossing an unsafe state without escalation
consequence claimed without declared causal link
